title: Invention Inspector
short_description: Before the light bulb, people used candles — match each invention to what folks relied on before it, and on grade 5, name who invented it.
description: Inspector Cogsworth investigates how inventions changed the way people live! For each clever gadget, work out how people managed BEFORE it existed — candles before the light bulb, horses before the car, letters before the telephone. It teaches cause-and-effect in history and how technology transformed daily life, with a fun fact on every miss. Grade bands ramp from everyday inventions, to more gadgets and ideas, to a grade-5 twist where you name who is credited with each invention. A free online inventions and history game for kids in grades 2–5, with streak bonuses feeding your score and GP.
controls: Mouse / tap what people used before the invention (or its inventor on grade 5).
